title: Electoral Strategy
shortSummary: Master the strategic layer of elections — seat-by-seat targeting, preference flows, redistribution impacts, above-the-line vs below-the-line, and the mathematics of winning government.
whyItMatters: Winning elections requires more than a good campaign in your own seat. Electoral strategy is about understanding the entire battlefield — which seats are winnable, how preferences flow, and where to allocate finite resources for maximum impact.
